source_note: The LSTM-4/Dense-4/50 baseline is the exported trained model result. Other cases are precomputed deterministic cases derived from the baseline teacher-student residual and can be replaced by real offline training outputs.

variants.label: LSTM-2 / Dense-4 / 30 epochs
variants.description: Lower-capacity student, precomputed from the exported baseline residual pattern.

variants.label: LSTM-4 / Dense-4 / 50 epochs
variants.description: Exported demo baseline: the trained distilled_lstm4.keras prediction.

variants.label: LSTM-8 / Dense-8 / 50 epochs
variants.description: Higher-capacity student, represented as a closer precomputed teacher approximation.

variants.label: LSTM-12 / Dense-8 / 80 epochs
variants.description: Larger student with smaller teacher-student residual in the precomputed sweep.

variants.label: LSTM-4 / Dense-4 / 50 epochs / 20% physics
variants.description: Baseline student blended with the physics prior as a deployment trade-off case.
